title: Blocky 3D Bars
description: 3D models to replace the paper-thin bars.
body:
## Blocky Bars

This resource pack gives all bars a bit more weight while retaining the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft. This was achieved by partitioning the model by its orientation, where only the horizontal posts and pickets were given an added layer of depth, resulting with a model that looks both hefty and free of noise from any distance.

_For the full blocky collection, try [Blocky Replacements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-replacements)._

### <u>Includes:</u>
☑ Proper texture-culling\
☑ No additional textures\
☑ No stretched textures\
☑ No texture fighting/z-fighting

## Showcase
